message.content:
@startuml
title Tennis Court Booking System

actor "users" as users
actor "siteManager" as siteManager
rectangle "SystemAdministrator" as SystemAdministrator

activate users
activate SystemAdministrator
activate siteManager

users -> SystemAdministrator : 1 bookSite()
SystemAdministrator -> siteManager : 2 deliverUserRequirements()
siteManager -> siteManager : 3 queryUnoccupiedSite()
siteManager --> SystemAdministrator : 4 returnUnoccupiedSiteInfo()
SystemAdministrator --> users : 5 decidedSite()
SystemAdministrator --> users : 6 noticeSiteInfo()

deactivate siteManager
deactivate SystemAdministrator
deactivate users

@enduml
